name: teammate-kit
description: Teammate workflow plugin with an entry guide, event-bus orchestration, and reusable teammate role skills.

interface.shortDescription: Guide, orchestration, and teammate role skills
interface.longDescription: Choose the right teammate workflow with the bundled guide skill, then either run durable event-bus orchestration or assign bounded research, implementation, and review work with dedicated teammate role skills.
defaultPrompt: Use $teammate-kit-guide to choose between orchestration, research, implementation, and review roles.
Use $teammate-orchestrator to run a teammate workflow with checkpoints and retries.
Use $teammate-researcher to gather evidence and hand off a decision-ready summary.
Use $teammate-implementer to make one scoped change and report verification.
Use $teammate-reviewer to audit a teammate change for regressions.
